evals.prompt: /theme-port — porta a seleção atual do Figma. URL: https://figma.com/design/abc123/My-App?node-id=12-456
evals.expected_output: Modo Figma: extrai fileKey + nodeId (converte '-' → ':'), valida figma-bridge MCP conectado, chama get_design_context (depth 4) + get_screenshot (scale 1), extrai estrutura (widths/heights/radius/spacing/text hierarchy), mapeia para AppColors/AppSpacing/AppRadius/textTheme, compõe widget em lib/features/<feature>/presentation/, roda flutter analyze, sugere /theme-audit no final.

assertions.text: Output extracts fileKey 'abc123' and nodeId '12:456' (converted from '12-456')
Bash tool runs `flutter analyze` before reporting done
Generated Dart code does NOT contain any literal `Color(0xFF...)` outside of theme files
Generated Dart code does NOT contain literal `fontSize:` or `fontWeight:` in the widget
Final report suggests `/theme-audit lib/features/<feature>` as next step
Output explicitly skips calling get_variable_defs and get_styles (theme is source of truth)

evals.expected_output: Modo Stitch: lê HTML local + screenshot irmão (.png), parser regex extrai widths/heights/border-radius/padding/gap/text-Nxl, mapeia Tailwind para AppSpacing/AppRadius via tabela, descarta cores hex/font-family/box-shadow/transitions/SVGs decorativos, mapeia tipo de elemento (<button>→AppButton, <input>→AppTextField, etc), compõe widget em lib/features/coupons/, roda flutter analyze.

assertions.text: Read tool reads BOTH the .html and the sibling .png file
Output explicitly mentions discarding Tailwind color classes (bg-blue-500, text-#FFF) without translating them
Generated Dart code uses AppSpacing.<token> and AppRadius.<token> (not literal px)
Bash tool runs `flutter analyze` before reporting done
Generated Dart code does NOT contain literal `Color(0xFF...)` in the widget

evals.prompt: Tenho 4 inputs de cadastro (nome, email, CPF, data de nascimento) no Figma agrupados num bloco. Como porto?
evals.expected_output: Aplica a regra AppFormGroup (2+ inputs no mesmo bloco lógico): wraps em AppFormGroup com filhos AppTextField(bare: true), bgSurface fill, borderDefault para outline + dividers, AppRadius.lg, sem padding vertical no container. NÃO combina bare:true com prefixIcon. Snippet Dart pronto.

assertions.text: Output wraps the 4 inputs in `AppFormGroup` (not 4 separate `AppTextField` solto)
Output references `references/widget-mapping.md` or repeats the AppFormGroup spec (bgSurface, borderDefault, AppRadius.lg)
Output explicitly notes that bare:true must NOT be combined with prefixIcon
